. • - S.0.1616(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section(l) of Section 8 of the Disaster Management ^gt, 2005 (53 of 2005), the Central Government hereby constitutes a National Executive Committee to cany out the various functions assigned to it under the said Act, consisting of the following members as specified in Sub-section (2) of Section 8 of the said Act, namely :— (i) Secretary, Ministry of Home Affairs (having administrative control of disaster management) (ii) Secretary, Ministry of Agriculture, Department of Agriculture and Cooperation J (iii) Secretary, Department of Atomic Energy (iv) Secretary, Ministry of Defence (v) Secretary, Ministry of Rural Development, Department of Drinking Water Supply (vi) Secretary, Ministry of Environment and Forests (vii) Secretary, Ministry of Finance, Department of Expenditure (viii) Secretary, Ministry of Health and Family Welfarej • r (ix) Secretary, Ministry of Power (x) Secretary, Ministry ofRural Development, Department of Rural Development (xj) Secretary, Ministry of Science and Technology, Department of Science and Technology (xii) Secretary, Department of Space L J (xiii) Secretary, Ministry of Communications, Department of Telecommunications (xiv) Secretary, Ministry of Urban Development, Department of Urban Development (xv) Secretary, Ministry of Water Resources 1 h (xvi) Chief of the Integrated Defence StafFof the Chiefs of Staff Committee. + Chairperson -Member -Member —Member -Member -Member Member -Member •Member Member Member -Member -Member Member -Memberr a Member [R No. 30/l/2006-NDM-III(A)] NAVEEN VERMA, Jt.
